authors.name: Shahnawaz Alam
authors.bio: Shahnawaz Alam is a Full-Stack Developer and AI Engineer with a strong focus on building scalable web applications using React.js and the MERN stack. He actively works on integrating AI-driven features into real-world systems and has hands-on experience deploying applications on AWS. As Lead of WebDev team of the AWS Cloud Club at MJCET, he contributes to building and maintaining production-grade websites while mentoring peers in full-stack and AI projects
authors.role: WebDev Lead, AWS Cloud Club MJCET
